meaning: adv.在其上,在那上面,...之后立即
examples: You will, in addition, pay to the bank any losses, costs, expenses or legal fees (including tax thereon).
And they shall take away the ashes from the altar, and spread a purple cloth thereon.
Life is a leaf of paper white, thereon each of us may write his word or two. A. Lowell.
However, there are certain catalysts which keep us hopeful of the situation improving thereon.
The stimulation of commerce is a use of the regulatory function quite as definitely as prohibitions or restrictions thereon.
